TEXT.label: Check power supply and compressed air supply.

label.en: Check power supply and compressed air supply.

TEXT.label: Remove the workpieces from the station manually.

label.en: Remove the workpieces from the station manually.

TEXT.label: Switch key to MANUAL mode, then press reset

label.en: Switch key to MANUAL mode, then press reset

TEXT.label: Switch key back to AUTO, then press START

label.en: Switch key back to AUTO, then press START
